jobs.title: IEC 60617 CAD Symbol Library Needed if you have
jobs.description:
if you have ready then only urgently,  I need a complete IEC 60617 control & instrumentation symbol library in both DWG and DXF formats for direct use in AutoCAD and other CAD tools.

Scope:
Accurate IEC-standard symbols (clean, 1:1 scale, proper layers)
Include outlines for Siemens SIMATIC S7-1200 modules for PLC-SCADA layouts

Deliverables:
Full symbol library (DWG + DXF) with organized folders
Separate files/layers for S7-1200 hardware outlines
Short read-me (naming + scaling standards)

Requirements:
Clean linework (no errors)
Correct layers & scale
Ready to insert into existing drawings
skills: 2D Drafting2D DrawingAutoCADCAD/CAMControl System DesignDraftingElectrical EngineeringPCB LayoutPLCPLC & SCADA

jobs.title: Full-stack Developer (Node.js & Python / AWS Lambda) Project Overview
jobs.description:
I am looking for a developer to help optimize and maintain a web system for image processing and text analysis. The project uses a Node.js backend for core logic and a Python-based serverless architecture for heavy analysis.

Technical Stack:

Server-side: Node.js (Express).

Database: MongoDB.

OCR/Analysis Engine: Python 3.x running on AWS Lambda.

Frontend: React (Vite environment).

Cloud & DevOps: AWS CLI, S3, Lambda Function URLs.

Key Responsibilities:

Backend Integration: Connect the Node.js server with Python Lambda functions for seamless data flow.

Database Management: Handle data
skills: API DevelopmentAWS LambdaContent Management System (CMS)Data IntegrationMobile App DevelopmentNode.jsPayment ProcessingPythonUser Interface / IAWeb Security

jobs.title: Polymarket Trade Monitoring & Reports
jobs.description:
I actively trade on Polymarket and now want to bring more discipline to the way I track results. Your role focuses strictly on the monitoring side of market trading: gathering data from my open and closed positions, turning it into clear trading performance reports, and flagging anything that needs my attention in real time.

Here’s what I need from you:

jobs.title: Modern Minimalist Logo Design
jobs.description:
I’m refreshing my brand identity and I need a sleek, professional logo that feels instantly modern yet remains minimalist and uncluttered. The palette is fixed to blue and white, so please explore tonal variations, gradients, or flat treatments within those two colors only.  

The mark itself should be an abstract icon rather than text-based. I’m especially drawn to triangular forms—single triangles, interlocking shapes, negative-space triangles—anything that conveys subtle motion and confidence without overcrowding the design. No literal imagery; keep the symbol stylised and timeless.

Clean

jobs.title: WordPress Diamond Pricing Calculator Plugin
jobs.description:
I need a bespoke WordPress plugin that can calculate the selling price of diamond jewellery on-the-fly. The form has to accept six user inputs—carat weight, diamond colour grade, diamond clarity grade, the current diamond price per carat, gold carat, and the current gold price per gram—and then return three figures: the total price, a transparent breakdown of each component, and a discounted price if a promo code is present.  

Visitors should see the numbers refresh instantly while they move the sliders or dropdowns, yet I also want an optional “Calculate” button for those who prefer a manual

jobs.description:
